creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please re-read 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/rc-scripts.html. 
Look at other rc script examples. Order is important.  do a 'man 
rc.subr' look at options to change kill signal if you think its needed. 
None of this is needed: start_cmd/stop_cmd/restart_cmd.  It's all built in.
